languages.text:
{n}Арджента одаривает девушку взглядом, полным искренней теплоты.{/n}
"Меня учили: истинную веру легче всего увидеть в час величайшего испытания. И вот она — передо мной. Годы лишений не отняли у тебя веры в Бога-Императора, а неминуемая присяга помазанни{mf|ку|це} Его станет достойной наградой за этот подвиг духа".

traits.locale_text:
{n}Арджента одаривает девушку взглядом, полным искренней теплоты.{/n}

traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text:
[драфт] {n}Арджента одаривает девушку взглядом, полным искренней теплоты.{/n}
"Меня учили: истинную веру легче всего увидеть в час величайшего испытания. И вот она — передо мной. Годы лишений не отняли у тебя веры в Святого Императора, а неминуемая присяга помазанни{mf|ку|це} Его станет достойной наградой за этот подвиг духа".

languages.text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

languages.text: {n}Argenta dedica a la joven una mirada llena de calidez sincera.{/n} «Me han enseñado que la verdadera fe se presencia más fácilmente en nuestras mayores pruebas, y hela aquí delante. Los años de privaciones no les han despojado de su fe en el Dios Emperador, y el inminente juramento de lealtad ante Su ungid{mf|o|a} será una digna recompensa por esta hazaña espiritual».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta dedica a la joven una mirada llena de calidez sincera.{/n} «Me han enseñado que la verdadera fe se presencia más fácilmente en nuestras mayores pruebas, y hela aquí delante. Los años de privaciones no les han despojado de su fe en el Dios Emperador, y el inminente juramento de lealtad ante Su ungid{mf|o|a} será una digna recompensa por esta hazaña espiritual».

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔向那年轻女子投去一道饱含着真挚温暖的目光。{/n}“曾有人教导我，在最严峻的考验时刻，真正的信仰最易得见。而此刻，它就在我眼前。多年困苦未能夺走你对神皇的信仰，而即将向祂的神选者立下的忠诚誓言，将是对你这份灵魂壮举当之无愧的回报。”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿洁塔向那年轻女子投去一道饱含着真挚温暖的目光。{/n}“曾有人教导我，在最严峻的考验时刻，真正的信仰最易得见。而此刻，它就在我眼前。多年困苦未能夺走你对神皇的信仰，而即将向祂的神选者立下的忠诚誓言，将是对你这份灵魂壮举当之无愧的回报。”

languages.text: {n}Argenta pose un regard empli de bienveillance sur la jeune femme.{/n} « On m'a appris que la foi véritable se révèle lors des épreuves les plus difficiles. Et m'en voilà témoin... Les années de privation n’ont pas émoussé votre foi en l'Empereur-Dieu, et votre serment de loyauté envers son {mf|élu|élue} sera une belle récompense pour cet exploit. »
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta pose un regard empli de bienveillance sur la jeune femme.{/n} « On m'a appris que la foi véritable se révèle lors des épreuves les plus difficiles. Et m'en voilà témoin... Les années de privation n’ont pas émoussé votre foi en l'Empereur-Dieu, et votre serment de loyauté envers son {mf|élu|élue} sera une belle récompense pour cet exploit. »

languages.text: {n}Argenta, genç kadına içten bir sıcaklıkla dolu bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Bana gerçek inancın, en kolay en büyük sınav anında görüldüğü öğretildi. İşte karşımda duruyor. Yıllarca süren yoksunluk, Tanrı İmparator'a olan inancını senden alamadı ve O'nun seçilmişine yakında edeceğin sadakat yemini, ruhunun bu başarısına layık bir ödül olacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta, genç kadına içten bir sıcaklıkla dolu bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Bana gerçek inancın, en kolay en büyük sınav anında görüldüğü öğretildi. İşte karşımda duruyor. Yıllarca süren yoksunluk, Tanrı İmparator'a olan inancını senden alamadı ve O'nun seçilmişine yakında edeceğin sadakat yemini, ruhunun bu başarısına layık bir ödül olacak."

languages.text: {n}Argenta betrachtet die junge Frau mit einer beträchtlichen Wärme.{/n} "Ich habe gelernt, dass sich wahrer Glaube am besten in der Stunde der Not zeigt. Und hier steht er vor mir. Jahrelange Entbehrungen haben Euch nicht Eures Glaubens an den Gottimperator beraubt, und der baldige Treueschwur für {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} ist ein würdiger Lohn für diese Geisteshaltung."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta betrachtet die junge Frau mit einer beträchtlichen Wärme.{/n} "Ich habe gelernt, dass sich wahrer Glaube am besten in der Stunde der Not zeigt. Und hier steht er vor mir. Jahrelange Entbehrungen haben Euch nicht Eures Glaubens an den Gottimperator beraubt, und der baldige Treueschwur für {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} ist ein würdiger Lohn für diese Geisteshaltung."

languages.text: {n}アルジェンタは若い女性に、純粋な温かさに満ちた眼差しを向ける。{/n}「真の信仰は、最大の試練の時にこそ、最も容易に目撃されるものだと教えられました。そして今、私の目の前にいる。長年の困窮は、あなたから神である皇帝への信仰を奪っていない。皇帝への忠誠を誓うという差し迫った誓いは、この精神の偉業にふさわしい報酬となるであろう。"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta bestows upon the young woman a look brimming with genuine warmth.{/n} "I was taught that true faith is most easily witnessed in the hour of greatest trial. And here it stands before me. Years of deprivation have not robbed you of your faith in the God-Emperor, and the imminent oath of loyalty to His anointed shall be a worthy reward for this feat of the spirit."
